reason: All acceptance criteria met. GroundingResult frozen dataclass, GroundingChecker with injectable embedding_fn (default paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2), default threshold=0.75, configurable. check() correctly embeds output+sources, computes cosine similarity, picks best match, compares to threshold. Empty sources returns grounded=False/no_source. 17 tests cover all logic paths. Minor dimension guard added per review.
